# SDP Field Reference

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_artifacts.py; do not edit by hand. -->

SDP version: `sdp-0.2.0`

This non-normative reference is generated from the Frictionless Table Schema files in `schema/frictionless/metadata/`. `SPECIFICATION.md` remains the human-readable validity specification.

## `metadata/dataset.csv`

Dataset-level metadata.

Requirement: `required`

One row per dataset.

| Column | Type | Requirement | Description | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| dataset_id | string | required | Stable identifier used to join to other metadata files. Prefer a DOI when available; otherwise use a stable local identifier. |  |
| title | string | required | Human-readable dataset title. |  |
| description | string | required | Short description of the dataset contents and purpose. |  |
| creator | string | required | Name(s) of dataset creator(s), team, or originating project/program. |  |
| contact_name | string | required | Primary inquiry contact, such as a person, team, or office. |  |
| contact_email | string | required | Contact email address for the inquiry contact. |  |
| license | string | required | License name or URL. | Examples: `CC-BY-4.0`, `Open Government Licence - Canada` |
| contact_org | string | optional | Organization for contact_name. Leave blank if already clear from contact_name or creator. |  |
| contact_position | string | optional | Role or title for contact_name, mainly useful when contact_name is an individual. |  |
| temporal_start | string | optional | Start date or year covered by the dataset. | Examples: `1996`, `1996-01-01` |
| temporal_end | string | optional | End date or year covered by the dataset. | Examples: `2024`, `2024-12-31` |
| spatial_extent | string | optional | Textual description of spatial coverage. |  |
| dataset_type | string | optional | High-level dataset type. |  |
| source_citation | string | optional | Citation for reports, publications, source databases, or internal documentation. |  |
| update_frequency | string | optional | Planned update cadence. | Allowed: `daily`, `weekly`, `monthly`, `annually`, `asNeeded`, `unknown` |
| topic_categories | string | optional | Semicolon-separated ISO 19115 topic categories for discovery classification. | Examples: `biota;oceans` |
| keywords | string | optional | Semicolon-separated free-text discovery keywords; avoid repeating topic_categories verbatim. | Examples: `coho;escapement;Fraser River` |
| security_classification | string | optional | Dataset security classification. | Examples: `unclassified` |
| provenance_note | string | optional | Narrative about data lineage. |  |
| created | datetime | optional | Timestamp when the dataset was created. |  |
| modified | datetime | optional | Timestamp when the dataset was last modified. |  |
| spec_version | string | optional | SDP specification version. | Examples: `sdp-0.2.0` |

## `metadata/tables.csv`

Table-level metadata.

Requirement: `required`

One row per table in the package.

| Column | Type | Requirement | Description | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| dataset_id | string | required | References dataset_id in metadata/dataset.csv. |  |
| table_id | string | required | Short ID for the table. |  |
| file_name | string | required | Relative path to the data file. Must not use ../. | Examples: `data/cu_timeseries.csv` |
| table_label | string | required | Human-readable label for the table. |  |
| description | string | required | Description of what each row represents. |  |
| observation_unit | string | optional | Human-readable label for the observation unit, meaning the thing each row is about. |  |
| observation_unit_iri | string | recommended | IRI for the observation unit class. |  |
| primary_key | string | optional | Comma-separated list of column names forming a primary key, with no spaces. |  |

## `metadata/column_dictionary.csv`

Column-level metadata.

Requirement: `required`

One row per column in each table.

| Column | Type | Requirement | Description | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| dataset_id | string | required | References dataset_id in metadata/dataset.csv. |  |
| table_id | string | required | References table_id in metadata/tables.csv. |  |
| column_name | string | required | Exact column name in the data file. Matching is case-sensitive. |  |
| column_label | string | required | Human-readable label. |  |
| column_description | string | required | Clear definition of the column's meaning. |  |
| column_role | string | required | Role of the column in the table. | Allowed: `identifier`, `attribute`, `temporal`, `categorical`, `measurement` |
| value_type | string | required | Basic value type. | Allowed: `integer`, `number`, `string`, `boolean`, `date`, `datetime` |
| required | boolean | optional | TRUE if the column is required for each row, otherwise FALSE or blank. |  |
| unit_label | string | optional | Human-readable unit label. |  |
| unit_iri | string | conditional | IRI for the unit. | Required when column_role is measurement. |
| term_iri | string | conditional | IRI for the term that represents what the column measures or represents. Use a SKOS concept for compound variables. | Required when column_role is measurement. |
| term_type | string | optional | Type of ontology or vocabulary term. | Allowed: `owl_class`, `owl_object_property`, `skos_concept` |
| property_iri | string | conditional | I-ADOPT property IRI. | Required when column_role is measurement. |
| entity_iri | string | conditional | I-ADOPT entity IRI, meaning what the measurement is about. | Required when column_role is measurement. |
| constraint_iri | string | optional | I-ADOPT constraint IRI(s). Separate multiple IRIs with semicolons. |  |
| method_iri | string | optional | Procedure or method IRI, aligned to SOSA sosa:Procedure. |  |

## `metadata/codes.csv`

Controlled code list metadata.

Requirement: `conditional`

Condition: Required when any column_dictionary.csv row has column_role equal to categorical.

One row per allowed code value in a categorical column.

| Column | Type | Requirement | Description | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| dataset_id | string | required | References dataset_id in metadata/dataset.csv. |  |
| table_id | string | required | References table_id in metadata/tables.csv. |  |
| column_name | string | required | Column name in the data file that uses this code. |  |
| code_value | string | conditional | Stored value in the data. | Required unless vocabulary_iri is provided. |
| code_label | string | optional | Human-readable label corresponding to the code. |  |
| code_description | string | optional | Longer description of what the code means. |  |
| vocabulary_iri | string | recommended | IRI for the controlled vocabulary system that defines valid values. |  |
| term_iri | string | recommended | IRI for the specific term that code_value represents. |  |
| term_type | string | optional | Type of term. | Allowed: `skos_concept`, `owl_class` |
